prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing minigit implementation with checkout and reset commands. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v2.sh
response:
```bash
#!/bin/bash

# test-v2.sh
# Run all tests for minigit v2

set -e

echo "Running tests for minigit v2..."

# Test init
echo "Testing init..."
rm -rf /tmp/minigit_test
mkdir -p /tmp/minigit_test
cd /minigit_test
../minigit init
if [ ! -d .minigit ]; then
    echo "FAIL: init did not create .minigit directory"
    exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: init"

# Test add
echo "Testing add..."
echo "test content" > file1.txt
../minigit add file1.txt
if [ ! -f .minigit/index ]; then
    echo "FAIL: add did not create index file"
    exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: add"

# Test commit
echo "Testing commit..."
../minigit commit -m "first commit"
if [ ! -d .minigit/objects ]; then
    echo "FAIL: commit did not create objects directory"
    exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: commit"

# Test checkout
echo "Testing checkout..."
echo "new content" > file1.txt
../minigit checkout file1.txt
if [ "$(cat file1.txt)" != "test content" ];
    echo "FAIL: checkout did not restore file content"
    exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: checkout"

# Test reset
echo "Testing reset..."
echo "another content" > file1.txt
../minigit add file1.txt
../minigit reset file1.txt
if [ "$(cat file1.txt)" != "test content" ]; then
    echo "FAIL: reset did not unstage file"
    exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: reset"

echo "All tests passed!"
```
